8 7 6

90 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Mercury is the governing planet of education and 2 to Mercury
there is Mars (Power). Mercury with Dragon Tail represent
study of Physics, Mercury is 11th to Jupiter. Hence the Native
will have the above qualifications.
Mars and Dragon Tail indicate Electronics-while Moon and
Venus are in 9th. Therefore the native will have education in
electronics line.
EXAMPLE CHARTS
Female Horoscode 6766:
There is a combination of Mercury + Mars in the chart.
Due to this the native will have medium education. Moon is in
5 and ketu is in 9 to this combination and it amounts to that
Mercury + Mars + Moon + Ketu are combined in one sign and
direction - South. In this combination, Mercury and Mars are
enemies to each other. Budha (Merucry) +Moon are planets of
pleasure or sensualistic planets. Mars +Mercury have ketu in the
9 to them, with this, the native will not enjoy the person who
